findings.summary: Citation label exists but does not support the answer's external-egress claim.
findings.claim: Private bundles can be sent to any external LLM by default.
findings.impact: Would permit unsafe reviewer egress and mislead users about privacy boundaries.
findings.suggested_fix: State that private evidence requires approved reviewer backend policy and explicit opt-in.

findings.summary: Docs imply a reviewer runner is already shipped when only schema/security baselines exist.
findings.claim: The autonomous reviewer runner is available now.
findings.impact: Product docs would misrepresent planned work as current behavior.
findings.suggested_fix: Move the statement to future-work language and link #161.

findings.summary: A recurring quickstart failure should become a regression candidate.
findings.claim: Users can run the quickstart without an auth setup step.
findings.impact: Future docs could regress by omitting auth setup again.
findings.suggested_fix: Add a golden quickstart/auth fixture before product docs claim one-command setup.

findings.summary: Reject a proposed rule that would always claim nightly optimizer support.
findings.claim: SourceBrief always has a nightly optimizer that updates skills automatically.
findings.impact: The rule encodes unsupported future-work as shipped behavior.
findings.suggested_fix: Keep the rejected proposal as negative feedback for future gates.
